hyperedges.label: Plan-Spec-Roadmap alignment for web My Submissions

nodes.label: Option A: Split Files (Quick Win)
nodes.source_location: rationale: 1-2 hours, mechanical refactor, zero behaviour change; eliminates template literal escaping fragility that caused the Solutions tab bug; makes ProblemPanel.ts readable (~200 lines); enables syntax highlighting and linting for HTML/CSS/JS

nodes.label: Option B: esbuild + TypeScript Webview
nodes.source_location: rationale: half a day effort, builds on Option A; adds real TypeScript for webview with type safety; esbuild bundles and tree-shakes; shared types between host and webview; cleaner CSP without unsafe-inline for scripts; foundation for React later

nodes.label: Option C: React Webview (Full GitLens-style)
nodes.source_location: rationale: days of effort; not recommended at qLab's current scale; revisit if webview UI grows substantially in complexity

nodes.label: Content Tiers (Hints/Editorial/Reference/Community)
nodes.source_location: rationale: progressively unlocked to incentivise genuine attempts before revealing answers; server-side gating ensures locked material never reaches client until earned

nodes.label: editorial field (problems collection, markdown string)
nodes.source_location: rationale: authored by Claude Code when creating/updating a problem; stored in MongoDB so API returns without filesystem read at request time; uses $set not $setOnInsert so re-seeding updates content

nodes.label: Lazy Loading (solutions fetch on tab click)
nodes.source_location: rationale: same pattern as My Submissions; avoids unnecessary API calls on panel open
nodes.norm_label: lazy loading (solutions fetch on tab click)

nodes.label: Server-side Content Gating
nodes.source_location: rationale: locked material never reaches client until earned; prevents client-side bypass
